creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

Can you please follow the pkg-message and let me know the result of it. I
am also using the same way to mount my music library wherever I am and it's
2TB in size. Never dropped in any problems.


On Wed, Mar 13, 2013 at 11:29 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of sysutils/fusefs-sshfs,
>
> Please note that PR ports/176874 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/176874
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
